name: Post Wheel Shallow
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, forces safety to choose between post and wheel. QB must read safety rotation quickly - if safety stays middle, hit wheel; if safety rotates, attack vacated area

name: Fake Jet Sweep with Power Run
core_idea: Misdirection from jet fake, creates numbers advantage at point of attack. Sell the jet fake completely - QB must execute proper mesh point timing

name: Power Read (Inverted Veer)
core_idea: Option run that pairs a halfback sweep with QB power. The end man on the line goes unblocked as the read key: if he crashes inside the QB gives the sweep, if he stays outside the QB keeps on power through the B gap. No pass option, the only decision is give or keep.

name: Play Action Cross
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, linebacker displacement from play action fake. QB must sell play action fake completely before looking up - timing critical on cross route

name: Midline Read Option
core_idea: Puts stress on middle linebacker - forces him to choose between run fit and slot coverage. QB must make decisive read on the midline defender - if he squeezes down give the handoff, if he stays high keep and attack the edge

name: Mesh
core_idea: Creates natural rub/pick action with crossing routes, forces defenders to communicate through traffic. Timing of mesh point is critical - receivers must maintain proper spacing and leverage through cross

name: Mesh Mills
core_idea: Natural rub action from mesh concept, creates pick play effect legally. Mesh timing is critical - receivers must cross at exact depth to create natural rub

name: Double Slot Crossing
core_idea: Creates natural picks/rubs between crossing slot receivers, stresses middle linebackers. Timing of crossing routes critical - must create natural rub without illegal pick

name: Slot Drive Levels
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, high-low stress on linebackers. Slot receiver must find soft spot in zone coverage and sit down, vs man must create separation with sharp break

name: Four Verticals
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, forces safeties to choose which seam to cover, creates 4-on-2 advantage deep. QB must identify pre-snap coverage and find the numerical advantage - throw to the side with less help

name: Flood
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, stress point between LB and safety zones. TE must find soft spot in zone coverage and sit down in window

name: Trap
core_idea: Gap run that traps the first defensive lineman outside the play-side guard: the play-side guard free releases to a linebacker and the backside guard pulls to kick the target out. Downhill through the A gap, usually same-side. RB stays patient and cuts off the trap block.

name: RPO Bubble Screen
core_idea: Forces defense to choose between stopping run or covering bubble screen. QB must make pre-snap decision based on box count and stick with read

name: Double Smash Concept
core_idea: High-low concept on right side overloads coverage, deep middle seam if safety cheats. Read the leverage of the safety - if he sits low, throw corner/speed out; if high, throw underneath out

name: Switch Drag
core_idea: Creates natural pick/rub action with crossing drags, occupies linebackers with two underneath threats. Switch timing is critical - receivers must cross at 8 yard depth simultaneously to create maximum rub effect

name: Spot Triangle
core_idea: Natural triangle spacing creates high-low stress on outside zone defenders. QB must read safety depth pre-snap to determine corner vs out route priority

name: RPO Bubble
core_idea: Numbers advantage on perimeter vs box defenders. Read the apex defender (OLB/SS) - if he sits on run, throw bubble immediately

name: RPO Duo Alert
core_idea: Safety coming down creates 1-on-1 deep, light box allows easy run. QB must make pre-snap box count decision, then alert to post if safety rotates

name: Trail Follow
core_idea: Seam hole in Cover 2, trail route following behind creates rub vs man. Trail concept - slot WR follows TE's route path for natural rub/pick vs man coverage

name: HB Screen
core_idea: Over-aggressive pass rushers, vacated underneath zones after receivers clear. QB must sell pass fake convincingly before delivering screen pass, timing is critical

name: Mesh with Wheel
core_idea: Creates natural pick/rub between mesh receivers, isolates RB wheel vs LB. Mesh receivers must create contact/rub while maintaining legal pick - timing is critical

name: Inside Trap
core_idea: Interior gap run behind a trap block: leave the first lineman outside the play-side guard unblocked, then kick him out with the pulling guard while the rest of the line blocks down. The lane opens in the A gap where he vacated.

name: Draw
core_idea: Linebackers dropping to cover underneath zones, Pass rush getting upfield. QB must sell pass fake convincingly to freeze linebackers

name: Levelsflood
core_idea: RB speed vs linebacker mismatch, bunch formation picks vs man, levels concept vs zone. RB must sell run fake then release clean up seam - QB reads safety rotation

name: Stick
core_idea: Creates triangle concept on right side - high, middle, low routes stress zone coverage and create natural picks from bunch formation. QB must read the triangle concept - if flat defender sinks, throw flat; if flat defender stays, throw corner over top

name: Power Read Toss
core_idea: Power read with a toss instead of a sweep: the pitch gets the back to the edge faster. Same read, the unblocked end man decides toss or QB power keep. A run-run option with no pass.

name: Spacingflood
core_idea: Creates horizontal stretch on right side safety, floods right side zones with 3 routes at different levels. Bunch receivers must stem together initially to create traffic, then break clean at different depths

name: Ycross with Vertical Stretch
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, TE speed mismatch vs linebackers in man coverage. TE must find soft spot in zone coverage and sit down, or use speed to separate in man coverage

name: Inside Zone
core_idea: Vertical routes clear second level, creates running lanes. RB must press vertical to set up blocks, then cut to daylight

name: Play Action Power Run Fake
core_idea: Linebackers biting on power run fake, creating void in intermediate zones. QB must sell the power run fake convincingly to freeze linebackers

name: Slant Flat
core_idea: Quick timing vs press coverage, underneath holes in Cover 3, picks vs man coverage. Slant must be thrown on time with anticipation - ball out before receiver breaks

name: Levelshighlow
core_idea: Natural holes in zone coverage between levels, slot receiver has option to sit or break based on leverage. Slot receiver must read coverage post-snap and make smart decision to sit in hole or continue route

name: Inside Zone Read Option
core_idea: Creates 2-on-1 with backside edge defender, forces defense to account for both inside run and edge keeper. QB must ride the mesh point and read backside edge defender - if edge crashes give, if edge stays pull

name: Jet Sweep Fake Power
core_idea: Misdirection - defense flows to jet fake while RB hits opposite gap. Sell the jet fake completely - QB must execute convincing fake handoff

name: RPO Y Flat
core_idea: Linebacker conflict - cannot cover both run fit and TE flat route. Read the linebacker over the TE - he dictates run or pass decision

name: Angletriangle
core_idea: Natural hole between linebacker and safety coverage - TE angle sits perfectly in void. TE must find soft spot and sit down - not continue angle if linebacker takes depth

name: Highlow Angle Concept
core_idea: Creates natural rub between slot and TE angle routes, attacks soft spots in zone coverage. Timing on slot angle route - hit at top of break before safety can close

name: Anglewheel Combination
core_idea: Deep middle void in Cover 2, underneath holes in Cover 3, creates horizontal stretch with angle/wheel combo. Angle route must find soft spot in zone coverage - sit down vs zone, continue vs man

name: HB Swing Screen
core_idea: Overaggressive pass rush, linebackers in coverage leaving swing lane open. Sell pass action to receivers while setting up screen timing - patience is critical

name: TE Screen
core_idea: Overpursuit by pass rush - uses aggressive rush against defense. TE must sell initial block for 2 counts before releasing to flat

name: Wheel Switch
core_idea: TE speed mismatch vs linebacker, creates vertical stretch on safety. TE must sell flat route initially then accelerate up sideline - timing critical

name: Ycross with Reload
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, TE corner route vs Cover 2 safety. Sell play action fake hard - linebackers must bite for crossing route to be open

name: Jailbreak Screen
core_idea: Overpursuit by pass rushers, creates natural screen lanes. Timing is critical - let rush develop before throwing screen

name: Smash
core_idea: High-low concept stresses Cover 2 safety - corner route attacks deep hole, hitch sits in underneath window. QB must read safety depth pre-snap to determine primary target - if safety sits deep, throw hitch; if safety jumps hitch, throw corner route

name: Slot Choiceoption Routes
core_idea: Linebacker/nickel defender in coverage on choice route, creates natural rub with TE drag. Slot receiver must read leverage and settle in soft spots - break opposite of defender pressure

name: Xdig with Slot Corner
core_idea: High-low concept on slot corner - corner route attacks deep hole in Cover 2 while dig works underneath. Slot corner route must work to open window between safety and corner - back shoulder available vs tight coverage

name: Power RPO
core_idea: Conflict defender - forces LB to choose run or pass coverage. QB must make quick pre-snap read and decisive post-snap decision - run vs pass based on linebacker reaction

name: Double Spotflood
core_idea: Bunch formation creates natural picks/rubs, flood concept overloads middle zones. Timing on crossing route - must hit window between linebackers and safeties

name: Drive Under
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, seam between zones at 12-14 yard depth. Drive route must attack the seam aggressively at 12-14 yard depth, sitting in zone holes

name: RPO Peek
core_idea: Forces defense to declare coverage early - exploits corner route window in Cover 3 or punishes light box with run. QB must make quick pre-snap read on box count, then peek corner route before defaulting to handoff

name: Four Verticals with Drag
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, forces safety to choose between corner and post. Read the leverage of safety over TE - if outside leverage take corner, if inside leverage look to post behind him

name: Ycross
core_idea: Shallow crossing route finds gaps in zone coverage, creates rub potential with dig route. TE must find soft spot in zone coverage and sit down vs zone, keep moving vs man

name: Dagger
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3 between linebacker and safety coverage. Dagger concept creates high-low stress on deep middle safety - if safety sits on dig, corner is open over top

name: Corner Strikefour Verticals Variation
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2 between safeties, corner route attacks leverage of outside shade corner. Corner routes must get vertical before breaking to corner - attack leverage of outside shade coverage

name: Post Rail
core_idea: Creates horizontal stretch on trips side with dual out routes, rail route attacks seam vs Cover 3. Timing is critical on out routes - QB must deliver ball as receivers break to sideline

name: Wheel
core_idea: Linebacker/Safety mismatch on running back speed, deep middle hole in Cover 2. Running back must sell flat route initially then break vertical on wheel

name: Drivezig Concept
core_idea: Uses bunch formation to create pick plays and confusion, drive concept attacks hole in Cover 3. Slot receiver must sell the drive route hard before breaking back on the zig - timing critical

name: Jet Power Read
core_idea: Jet sweep paired with QB power. The end man on the line is the read key: crash gives the jet sweep (the handoff is automatic), stay outside keeps QB power through the B gap. No pass option.

name: Play Action Read
core_idea: LB level vacated by play action fake, deep comeback vs soft coverage. Sell the run fake completely - eyes down, full mesh point with RB to freeze linebackers

name: Duo
core_idea: Creates double teams on interior DL, isolates linebackers. RB must hit the hole hard and fast - no dancing, trust the scheme

name: QB Sweep
core_idea: Edge with QB speed, overload blocking to perimeter. QB must get to the edge quickly, follow lead blocker

name: Quick Base Run
core_idea: Safeties playing deep due to vertical routes, creates lighter run support. Sell pass action with vertical routes while executing sound run blocking fundamentals

name: RPO Alert
core_idea: Linebacker conflict - can't cover flat and defend run gap simultaneously. QB must read linebacker over TE - if LB drops to cover flat, hand off run. If LB stays for run fit, throw flat

name: Read Slide RPO
core_idea: Conflict defender who has dual run/pass responsibility - forces him to choose. QB must read one defender (usually slot LB/safety) and stick with decision - no second guessing

name: QB Designed Run
core_idea: Creates 11-on-11 run fit with QB as extra gap threat. QB must be decisive - hit the gap hard behind lead blocker or cut immediately

name: Levelssail
core_idea: Creates 3-level horizontal stretch on strong side, backside cross prevents rotation. Sail route must find soft spot in zone coverage and sit down vs zone, run past defender in man

name: Scissors Crossers
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, linebacker level in Cover 3, creates natural rubs vs man coverage. Timing of crossing routes creates scissors effect - shallow cross must clear first to set up rub for deep crosser

name: Cornerflat Combo
core_idea: High-low concept on outside - corner route attacks deep hole in Cover 2 while flat route occupies underneath coverage. Corner route must get proper depth (14-16 yards) before breaking to sideline - timing critical vs Cover 2 hole

name: RPO Counter
core_idea: EMLOS defender in conflict - can't cover both run and pass. QB must read EMLOS defender pre and post snap - sell run fake completely

name: Levelsmills Combo
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, underneath zone in Cover 2. TE must find soft spot in zone coverage at proper depth

name: Jet Touch RPO
core_idea: Flat defender cannot cover both jet sweep and drag route - creates 2x1 advantage. QB must read flat defender pre and post snap - his movement dictates run or pass

name: Speed Option
core_idea: Creates 2-on-1 with unblocked edge defender, stretches defense horizontally. Read the edge defender - if he takes QB, pitch to RB; if he takes RB, keep ball

name: Play Action Deep Cross
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates natural rub between crossing routes. Sell play action fake convincingly to freeze linebackers and create larger windows

name: Play Action Flood
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates crossing route vs man coverage. Sell play action fake completely before reading the crossing dig route

name: Deep Post
core_idea: Deep middle void in Cover 2, leverage advantage vs single high safety. Post route must stem vertical first 12 yards then break at 45-degree angle to find window

name: Stick Concept with Circle Route
core_idea: Triangle concept creates high-low-wider read vs zone, stick finds soft spots. Stick route must find soft spot and sit vs zone, convert to slant vs man

name: Clearout Rub Return
core_idea: Creates natural pick/rub with TE vertical clearing linebacker, slot receiver returns to void. Slot receiver must sell vertical route initially before breaking back to create separation via rub

name: Shallow Crossdrag
core_idea: Shallow crossing route creates natural rub vs man, finds holes in zone coverage underneath. Timing on shallow cross is critical - QB must anticipate throwing to spot before WR gets there

name: Spacing Switch
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, bunch picks vs man coverage. Bunch receivers must create clean releases and proper spacing on switch routes

name: Power
core_idea: Numbers advantage in run fit - trips formation pulls coverage away from run strength. RB must be patient and let the pulling guard and TE create the hole before hitting gap

name: Jet Sweep
core_idea: Horizontal stretch of defense, gets speed in space, attacks edge quickly before help arrives. Clean mesh point exchange - QB reverse pivots, WR maintains full speed through handoff

name: Power Gap Scheme
core_idea: Numerical advantage at point of attack with pulling guard, misdirection away from trips side strength. RB must be patient and let pulling guard lead through the hole - hit it vertical behind the puller

name: Curl Switchrub Concept
core_idea: Creates natural rub/pick action between stacked receivers, forces defenders to navigate traffic. Timing of the switch is critical - receivers must rub/brush past each other to create picks

name: Cheat Wheel Post
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, linebacker bite on play action creating wheel mismatch. Sell play action fake hard to get linebacker bite and create wheel mismatch

name: Power O
core_idea: Creates double-team at point of attack with pulling guard providing extra gap. RB must be patient and let pulling guard create the hole - hit B gap hard

name: Play Action Quick Game
core_idea: Quick timing before coverage can close, soft corner technique. Sell play action fake completely, quick 3-step drop timing to Z receiver

name: RPO Read Option
core_idea: Forces linebacker to choose between run fit and pass coverage. QB must make quick pre-snap read of linebacker alignment and commit to decision

name: Dig Z Spot
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, underneath zones in Cover 3, creates natural picks with crossing routes. Z receiver must sit in soft spot vs zone, work back to QB vs man coverage

name: Red Zone Spotpick Concept
core_idea: Condensed spacing creates natural picks and rubs in tight quarters. Timing and spacing critical in red zone - receivers must sit in windows

name: Slot Post
core_idea: Seam between linebacker and safety in Cover 3, deep middle hole in Cover 2. Slot receiver must sell vertical stem before breaking to post at 12-15 yard depth

name: Bench
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, underneath zones with crossing dig. Slot receiver must find soft spot in zone coverage and sit in window

name: Mesh with Orbit Motion
core_idea: Natural pick/rub action from mesh creates separation vs man coverage. Timing of mesh point is critical - receivers must maintain proper depth and spacing

name: HB Draw
core_idea: Over-aggressive pass rushers, Creates running lanes behind committed rush. Sell pass action completely - all receivers must run authentic routes to freeze linebackers and safeties

name: Benchcomeback
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, comeback routes sit between zone levels in Cover 3. Comeback routes must stem vertically to create proper spacing and sit in zone windows at precise depth

name: Play Action Stretch
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, corner route over Cover 3 corner, trips bunch creates pick potential. Sell stretch fake completely before pulling up - RB must attack edge to sell run action

name: RPO Zone Bubble
core_idea: Numbers advantage - force defense to choose run or pass. QB must make pre-snap count then read one defender post-snap

name: Yfork Play Action
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, linebacker depth vs Fork concept. TE must read coverage on Fork route - sit in soft zone, break vs hard coverage

name: Inside Zone Weak
core_idea: Weak side gap with FB lead creating 2-on-1 advantage at point of attack. RB must be patient and let zone develop while FB creates initial crease

name: Counter Gap
core_idea: Creates misdirection with counter action, pulls guards create numbers advantage. RB must sell counter step away from hole before cutting back - timing is critical

name: Triple Option RPO
core_idea: Horizontal stretch of defense, numbers advantage on edge. QB must read inside-out: dive defender first, edge second, safety third

name: Inside Zone Dive
core_idea: Vertical routes clear all deep coverage creating light box. Vertical routes must sell deep to clear safeties and create light box

name: RPO Alert Flat
core_idea: Flat defender conflict - can't cover run and pass simultaneously. QB must read flat defender pre and post snap - throw if he crashes down

name: Split Zone with Orbit Motion
core_idea: Horizontal stretch on edge defender, misdirection. QB must read backside edge defender commitment - crash down = RB, stay home = orbit

name: Jet Sweep with QB Zone Read
core_idea: Edge defender conflict - cannot cover both jet and QB run/pass. QB must read edge defender commitment - hand off vs crash, keep vs sit

name: QB Zone Read with Jet Motion Weak
core_idea: Horizontal stretch with jet motion, numbers advantage with empty backfield. QB must read the unblocked edge defender while managing jet sweep timing

name: Counter
core_idea: Misdirection away from RB alignment, uses defense's pursuit against them. RB must be patient for pulling guards to clear, then hit gap decisively

name: Spacing
core_idea: RB speed mismatch vs linebacker coverage, bunch formation creates natural picks. RB wheel is the money route - attack LB who can't run with RB vertically

name: Slot Crossdrag
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates rub action between crossing routes, overloads middle of field. TE must sell vertical stem before breaking across - creates separation from linebacker coverage

name: Double Inside Routesdig Concept
core_idea: Middle of field hole in Cover 3, creates rub routes vs man coverage, overloads inside coverage. Timing on dig routes - QB must anticipate windows, receivers must find soft spots in zone coverage

name: Gos with Shake Route
core_idea: Creates hole behind linebackers and in front of safeties with shake route, forces single coverage on outside receivers. Shake route timing is critical - must sell first move to set up second break

name: Deep Crossdagger
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates natural rub/pick between crossing routes. Timing on crossing routes is critical - receivers must find soft spots between zones and avoid collision

name: Wheel Cross Combination
core_idea: RB speed mismatch vs LB, deep cross behind LB level, TE underneath vs zone. RB must sell flat route before breaking vertical on wheel - this is the deception

name: Jet Touchquick Game
core_idea: Leverages motion to create easy completion, gets ball to speed in space. Timing between QB and jet motion receiver - must catch in stride

name: Triple Posts
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, overwhelms two safeties in Cover 4 with three vertical posts. All three receivers must stem vertically first then break to posts at different timing to create spacing

name: Slidelevels
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, bunch formation creates pick opportunities vs man. Bunch formation creates natural picks - WRs must work together to free up primary receiver

name: Digspot
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates rub potential from bunch formation. Dig route must find the soft spot in zone coverage and settle vs pressure

name: Diglevels
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates horizontal stretch with dig + flat combo. Timing on the dig route is critical - throw as receiver reaches linebackers' depth

name: Trips Floodmountain Concept
core_idea: Creates natural rub between trips receivers, attacks Cover 3 hole between hook and deep third. Slot receiver must sit in hole between LB and safety coverage on post route

name: Mountain Corners
core_idea: Deep outside holes in two-high safety coverage, stresses corner coverage at break point. Corner routes must sell vertical stem first 12-14 yards before breaking at 45-degree angle to corner

name: Whip
core_idea: Quick timing before linebacker can react to TE break. TE must sell vertical stem before sharp break on whip route

name: Play Action Bootleg
core_idea: Linebackers biting on play fake, deep middle seam. Sell play fake hard to freeze linebackers and create throwing lanes

name: Split Zone
core_idea: Creates natural running lane with TE escort block. RB must read the frontside guard's block to find the split

name: Spotquick Game
core_idea: Natural hole in Cover 2 between CB and safety, underneath zone weakness. Slot receiver must sit in hole vs zone, break sharp vs man coverage

name: Mountainlevels Curls
core_idea: Creates horizontal and vertical stretches with multiple curl routes at different depths. Multiple curl routes create 'mountain' effect with receivers sitting in zone holes at different levels

name: Read Option
core_idea: Forces defense to account for both QB and RB, creates 11-on-11 math. QB must read the hip of the edge defender - if hips turn inside toward RB, keep the ball

name: Fade Concept
core_idea: Slot receiver speed/height advantage vs linebacker or safety in coverage. Slot receiver must sell vertical route and create separation at top of fade

name: Powergap
core_idea: Creates numerical advantage at point of attack with pulling guard. RB must be patient and let pulling guard establish the point of attack

name: Dig
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, natural crossing window between LB and safety levels. Dig route must settle in window between coverage levels - not continue running through traffic

name: Slantquick Game
core_idea: Quick timing beats pass rush, trips overload creates picks and confusion. Play action sell must be convincing, quick release on slant timing

name: Inside Zoneduo
core_idea: Creates numerical advantage in run fit with spread formation forcing defense to cover receivers. RB must be patient and let blocks develop - hit the crease when it opens

name: Direct Snap Handoff
core_idea: Removes QB from equation, faster mesh point, catches defense in pass coverage. RB must secure direct snap cleanly and read inside zone blocking scheme immediately

name: TE Middle Screen
core_idea: Uses pass rush momentum against defense, creates open middle field. Timing is critical - must let pass rush commit before releasing screen

name: Scissorscrossing Routes
core_idea: Middle of field with scissors crossing concept, creates natural rubs. Timing on crossing routes - TE and slot must avoid collision while creating natural pick

name: RPO Glance Post
core_idea: Forces defense to declare run or pass coverage pre-snap; exploits aggressive LB run fits with quick passing game. QB must make pre-snap box count and identify the apex defender who becomes the RPO read key

name: Double Slant
core_idea: Underneath zone windows and soft cornerback coverage. Timing is everything - QB must deliver ball on slant breaks before defenders can drive

name: Empty Backfield Swing Screen
core_idea: Aggressive pass rush - screen behind rushers, LB coverage on TE mismatch. Sell screen fake - let rushers get upfield then dump behind them

name: Outside Zone Toss
core_idea: Horizontal stretch of defense, gets RB to edge quickly. Clean toss exchange, RB must get depth and width before turning upfield

name: Swing Cross Combination
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, underneath zones with crossing routes. Timing on crossing route critical - must clear linebacker level before safety arrives

name: Stick Concept with Spacing Switch
core_idea: Creates triangle concept on right side - high/middle/low routes stress zone coverage. Slot receiver must find soft spot in zone and sit down - not a timing route

name: RPO Zone Alert
core_idea: Numbers advantage - forces defense to pick run or pass coverage. QB must make pre-snap read of box count and post-snap read of leverage

name: Jet Touch Pass
core_idea: Horizontal stretch with jet motion, crossing route vs man coverage, quick game timing. Quick decision - hand off jet if numbers favor run, pull and throw if pass read is there

name: Inverted Veer
core_idea: Numerical advantage in run game while maintaining pass threat. QB must read EMLOS first - if he crashes inside on RB, pull and attack edge

name: Mountain Screen
core_idea: Aggressive pass rushers flying upfield, leaves underneath space. Timing is everything - QB must sell pass rush fake before delivering screen

name: Ypost with Trips Flood
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, TE speed advantage over linebacker, trips side overload. TE must sell vertical stem before breaking to post - timing critical with QB

name: Forkhighlow
core_idea: High-low conflict on safety - forces choice between deep corner and intermediate out. QB must read safety depth and leverage to determine fork choice - high safety = throw corner, low safety = throw out

name: Crossing Routesmesh
core_idea: Red zone compressed field creates natural picks from crossing routes, TE size advantage on corner route. Crossing routes must work at different levels to avoid collision and create natural picks in compressed red zone field

name: Double Post with Reverse Dragon
core_idea: Deep middle hole between safety and linebackers, bunch formation creates picks. Bunch receivers must sell their routes and create natural picks on post breaks

name: RPO Alert Out
core_idea: Linebacker conflict - can't cover run and pass simultaneously. QB must make pre-snap read of linebacker alignment and stick to decision

name: Corner Route Concept
core_idea: Deep outside zones, corner pockets between safety and corner coverage. Corner routes must break at 45-degree angle to corner pocket, timing critical at 18-yard depth

name: Levels
core_idea: Creates 3-level horizontal stretch - deep, intermediate, short - forcing zone defenders to choose coverage level. QB must identify coverage pre-snap and work high to low through the levels - deep corner vs Cover 2, intermediate out vs Cover 3

name: Zone Read RPO
core_idea: Numbers advantage in run game or quick passing lanes. QB must read EMLOS first - if he crashes down on RB, pull and throw quickly

name: RPO Alert Bubble
core_idea: Numbers advantage - creates 2x1 on outside with bubble screen vs single defender. QB must make pre-snap read of slot defender alignment and box count - throw bubble if defender sits inside or run if he widens

name: Jet Sweep with Inside Zone
core_idea: Gets speed in space to the edge, uses motion to create misdirection. Timing between QB and jet motion receiver is critical - mesh point must be clean

name: RPO Slant
core_idea: Slot defender conflict - can't cover run and pass. QB must make quick read on slot defender - ball out in 2.5 seconds

name: Inside Crossmesh
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, underneath zone coverage gaps. Timing on mesh routes - TE and WR1_X must coordinate crossing depths to create effective rub

name: Yswirl
core_idea: Slot defender conflict - swirl route creates separation vs both zone and man. Slot receiver must read leverage and break opposite of defender's position

name: Trips Flood
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, vertical stretch on safety with post/wheel combo. Post route timing - throw when receiver breaks at 15 yards, lead him to the hole

name: Four Verticals Ycross
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3 between LBs and safety. TE crossing route creates natural rub vs man. TE must sit in window between LB and safety coverage - timing crucial at 15 yard depth

name: Orbit Motion  Spacing
core_idea: Horizontal stress with orbit motion, deep middle hole if safety rotates. QB must read edge defender reaction to orbit motion - give or throw based on his movement

name: RPO Flat Wheel
core_idea: Flat defender cannot cover both levels - creates high-low conflict. QB must read flat defender's hips and leverage - sitting = wheel, jumping = flat

name: Deep Post Concept
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, single high safety leverage. Post route must stem vertical first 12 yards then break at 45 degree angle to split safeties

name: Shallow Cross
core_idea: Linebacker levels - creates picks/rubs between crossing routes, exploits soft spots in zone coverage. Timing on crossing routes - slot and TE must maintain proper spacing to create natural picks

name: Play Action Levels
core_idea: Play action freezes linebackers, creates levels to stress zone coverage at multiple depths. Play action sell must be convincing to freeze linebackers and create throwing lanes

name: Post Flood
core_idea: Deep outside zones, overloads right side coverage with 3 routes. Flood concept - overload one side with multiple route levels to stress zone coverage

name: RPO Buck Bubble
core_idea: Numerical advantage on bubble screen or light box for run. QB must read bubble defender pre-snap and execute decision quickly

name: Inside Zone Read
core_idea: Numbers advantage in run game, quick slant vs flowing LB. QB must read MIKE linebacker post-snap - if he flows hard to RB, slant is open

name: Four Verticals with Drag Conversion
core_idea: Deep middle hole vs Cover 2, forces safeties to choose between verticals. X receiver must sit in windows vs zone, continue vs man coverage on drag

name: Floodlevels
core_idea: Floods right side with multiple levels - creates natural picks and overloads zone coverage. Read safety rotation pre-snap to determine if attacking deep out vs Cover 3 or corner route vs Cover 2

name: Dig Concept with Vertical Clear
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates high-low stress on middle linebacker. Dig route must find soft spot between zones and sit in window

name: Mills
core_idea: High-low stretch on outside linebacker with wheel/flat combo, deep comeback sits in Cover 2 hole. Mills concept creates high-low read with comeback settling in zone coverage gaps

name: Inside Zoneduo Gap
core_idea: Creates double teams on interior linemen, bunched receivers stress secondary coverage. RB must press the A gap hard and cut based on linebacker flow, not predetermined

name: QB Powerblast
core_idea: Numbers advantage in box with lead blocker, misdirection from trips formation. QB must stay behind lead blocker and hit gap at full speed

name: Fadeback Shoulder Combination
core_idea: Single high safety cannot cover fade and prevent middle seam - creates 2-on-1. Fade route requires perfect back shoulder timing and WR must shield defender with body

name: Smashcorner
core_idea: Deep outside hole in Cover 2 between corner and safety, plus underneath window. High-low read on right side - if safety jumps corner, hit comeback; if safety sits, hit corner

name: Outside Zone with Fake Handoffcheat
core_idea: Weak side edge with TE motion creating extra gap, stretches defense horizontally. RB must press vertical first then cut to daylight, fake handoff sells play action potential

name: Levelsmills
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, underneath zones with level spacing. Timing and precision - Z must sit in soft spot, slot must clear underneath defenders

name: Slot Cross
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, slot receiver vs linebacker mismatch in zone. Slot receiver must get depth on cross to clear linebackers and find window

name: Digfork
core_idea: The fork concept creates a horizontal stretch on linebackers - dig route attacks deep zone hole while drag attacks underneath. QB must identify the 'fork' in linebacker coverage - throw dig if LB sits, throw drag if LB jumps dig route

name: RPO Read
core_idea: Forces flat defender into impossible choice - cover run or pass. QB must read flat defender first step - if he closes on run, ball goes to flat immediately

name: Red Zone Spot
core_idea: Back corner void in Cover 2, soft coverage underneath. Red zone corner routes must have precise timing and placement - back shoulder throws

name: Spotoption Route Combo
core_idea: Coverage holes - X receiver finds soft spot in zone or breaks vs man leverage. X receiver must read coverage correctly - sit in zone holes, break opposite of defender leverage in man

name: Horizontal Spacingsmash
core_idea: Creates horizontal stretch across the field with multiple zone-beaters at different levels. QB must read zones horizontally - find the open window between defenders rather than forcing to specific receiver

name: Wheel Concept
core_idea: RB wheel creates mismatch vs linebacker coverage, forces safety to choose between deep post and wheel route. RB must stem inside initially to sell run fake, then break outside for wheel route

name: Dive
core_idea: Vertical route clearing creates light box, attacks A-gap weakness. Quick decisive handoff, RB attacks A-gap immediately with north-south running

name: Inside Zone Split
core_idea: Creates extra gap with FB lead block, overwhelms inside linebackers. RB must be patient and follow FB through designated gap, trust the zone scheme

name: Play Action Counter Bootleg
core_idea: LB level hole between coverage shells, counter action freezes MLB. Sell counter fake completely - RB must attack playside gap to freeze LBs

name: Double Cross
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates natural rub vs man coverage with crossing routes at different depths. Sell play action fake completely - RB and QB must make convincing handoff fake to freeze linebackers

name: Duoinside Zone
core_idea: Numbers advantage in the box with multiple lead blockers. RB must be patient and follow FB lead block, hit gap hard after FB clears MLB

name: Switchcrossing Routes with Wheel
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates rub action vs man coverage with crossing routes. Switch concept timing - TE must clear first for Z receiver to cross behind

name: Switchrub Concept
core_idea: Creates natural rub/pick action between TE and WR crossing paths. Timing of switch routes critical - TE and WR must coordinate crossing paths

name: Play Action Bootleg with Jet Motion
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, jet motion forces defense to declare coverage early. Sell jet fake completely - linebackers must bite on run action for crossing routes to be open

name: RPO Jet Sweep Read Option
core_idea: Horizontal stretch on EMLOS defender, creates 2-on-1 with jet sweep and dive. QB must make decisive read on EMLOS - if he takes jet give dive, if he sits on dive pitch jet

name: QB Counter
core_idea: Empty formation forces defense to declare coverage, jet motion creates misdirection and extra gap. QB must sell the handoff fake before keeping, jet motion timing is critical for effective lead blocking

name: Quick Slanttouch Concept
core_idea: Quick timing beats pass rush, multiple slants flood short zones, picks created by bunch formation. Quick 3-step drop timing, read leverage and throw to open window immediately

name: Play Action Slot Option
core_idea: Slot defender indecision on option route, LB bite on play action fake. Slot receiver must read leverage of defender to determine slant or out option

name: QB Wrapsweep
core_idea: Edge pursuit angles, gets speed in space on perimeter. Sell fake handoff to RB, wrap tight around TE seal block

name: Corner Strikeflood
core_idea: Deep corner hole in Cover 3, overloads right side with trips formation. Corner route timing is critical - throw ball to where receiver will be, not where he is

name: Curls
core_idea: Sits in windows between underneath coverage and deep zones, multiple comeback options. All curl routes must sit in soft spots of zone coverage and be precise with timing

name: Y Corner
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, leverage advantage vs outside linebacker in Cover 3. TE must get proper depth and angle on corner route - sell vertical before breaking to corner

name: RPO Slantpeek
core_idea: LB run/pass conflict - forces defender to choose run or pass responsibility. QB must make RPO read on linebacker - hand off if LB sits, throw if LB flows

name: QB Power
core_idea: Numerical advantage with lead blocker, misdirection element. QB must follow the lead blocker and hit the designed gap

name: Cross Dig
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, underneath zone gaps, crossing route vs man creates separation. Play action fake must sell run convincingly to freeze linebackers

name: Option Wheel
core_idea: TE vs linebacker mismatch, option route creates separation vs any coverage. TE must read coverage post-snap - sit in zone holes, wheel vs man

name: Whipsquick Game
core_idea: Bunch formation creates natural picks and confusion in coverage. Bunch timing and spacing critical - receivers must work together to create natural picks

name: Crossdrag Concept
core_idea: Creates natural pick plays from bunch formation, stresses linebackers with crossing routes at multiple levels. Timing on crossing routes - deep cross at 15 yards, drag at 8 yards creates layered concept

name: Switchpick
core_idea: Natural picks created by bunch formation, forces defenders to navigate traffic. Timing of switch routes critical - receivers must sell initial direction then break cleanly

name: RPO Slot Option
core_idea: Forces slot defender to choose run or pass responsibility - creates numerical advantage. QB must read slot defender pre and post snap - if he's high throw slant, if he's low hand off inside zone

name: Circlewheel Concept
core_idea: RB speed vs LB in coverage, creates natural pick with TE cross. RB must sell initial flat route before breaking upfield on wheel

name: RPO Peek Slant
core_idea: Inside linebacker conflict - can't cover slant and stop run. QB must make quick pre-snap read of box count and execute mesh point decision rapidly

name: Scissorsrub
core_idea: Red zone compression creates natural picks, TE/LB mismatch, crossing route creates rub. Scissors concept uses crossing routes to create natural rubs and free up receivers

name: Triple Slants
core_idea: Quick timing beats pass rush, multiple slants stress zone coverage. Triple slant timing - 3 step drop, ball out on QB's 3rd step

name: Jet Touch
core_idea: Edge discipline - forces defense to choose between stopping jet sweep or covering crossing routes. QB must read edge defender - if he crashes down on jet motion, pull ball and throw crossing route

name: Play Action Zone Read
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, Safety conflict with play action fake. Sell the zone read fake to freeze linebackers and create deep shot opportunities

name: Curl N Godouble Move
core_idea: CB playing close coverage who will bite on curl fake, creates big play opportunity. WR must sell the curl fake completely - head turn, settle, then explode vertically past CB

name: RPO Peek Spot
core_idea: Forces linebacker to choose between run fit and pass coverage - creates conflict. QB must read linebacker eyes and body language - commit to decision quickly

name: Snag
core_idea: Creates natural pick play with slot speed out rubbing off defender, attacks soft spots in zone coverage. Timing of snag combo is critical - slot must create effective rub without illegal pick

name: Outside Zone Sweep
core_idea: Wide field to right side, uses speed to edge, stretches defense horizontally. RB must get to edge quickly, patience for blocks to develop, cut upfield when clear

name: Quick Gametouch Pass
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, soft spots between zone coverage levels. Touch pass timing - QB must deliver ball as receiver settles in coverage window

name: Highlow Corner Choice
core_idea: High-low concept stresses linebacker in middle, choice route creates separation vs any coverage. Z receiver must read defender leverage - sit vs zone, break vs man

name: Power Gap
core_idea: Creates extra gap with pulling guard, uses TE to seal edge. RB must press the hole and get vertical - trust the pulling guard lead block

name: RPO Swing
core_idea: Quick swing gets RB in space vs pursuing linebackers. QB must quickly identify blitz pre-snap and get ball to RB swing immediately

name: QB Zone Read
core_idea: Numbers advantage in run fit - 5 OL + QB vs reduced box. QB must read unblocked defender eyes and shoulders - commit to decision

name: Spotwheel Combination
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, underneath zones with spot route. Bunch formation creates natural picks and rubs - slot receiver must find window between zones

name: Cross Post Combination
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, bunch formation creates natural picks vs man. Crossing routes must find windows between linebackers and safeties

name: Cornerhighlow
core_idea: High-low concept puts slot defender in bind - can't cover both levels. QB must read the slot defender - if he sinks, throw underneath; if he jumps the out, throw corner

name: Screen Wheel
core_idea: Aggressive pass rushers running upfield, LBs dropping too deep in coverage. Timing is critical - must sell pass action before releasing screen, OL must set protection briefly before releasing

name: Levels Sail
core_idea: Creates 3-level vertical stretch on trips side - forces defense to cover high, middle, and low simultaneously. Levels concept creates vertical spacing to stress zone coverage at multiple depths

name: Hitch and Go
core_idea: Corner back jumping hitch route, deep middle hole in Cover 2, over-aggressive coverage. WR must sell the hitch convincingly to get CB to bite, then explode vertical

name: Branchflood
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates pick plays from bunch formation. Branch concept creates natural rubs from bunch formation while TE attacks deep middle

name: Crossersmesh
core_idea: Middle linebacker depth - crossers attack void between LB and safety coverage. Sell play action fake completely - linebackers must bite on run fake for crossers to be effective

name: RPO Zone Peek
core_idea: LB caught between run support and pass coverage - creates 8-12 yard window. QB must read LB over TE pre and post snap - if LB flows to run, TE will be open in peek window

name: QB Counter with Jet Motion
core_idea: Misdirection from jet motion, gap created by pulling linemen, LB flow to motion. Proper mesh point timing between QB and jet motion receiver - secure fake before executing counter

name: Inside Zone Duo
core_idea: Creates double teams on interior, TE wing adds extra gap. RB reads back of center, cuts to first vertical seam

name: Jet Sweep Motion Screen
core_idea: Horizontal stretch of defense, speed in space vs slower defenders. QB mesh point timing with jet motion - proper exchange technique critical

name: Undercrossing Route Concept
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, underneath zone coverage gaps. TE must sit in hole between zones or find soft spot in coverage

name: Play Action Slide Protection
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, creates rub action with crossing drag. Sell play action fake completely - QB must show handoff to freeze linebackers

name: Deep Cross
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, TE mismatch vs linebacker in man. TE must find soft spot in coverage and sit in zone or use speed vs man

name: Ycross with Fade
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, TE speed mismatch vs LB in man. TE must win inside leverage on cross - this is the money route

name: Slip Screen
core_idea: Overly aggressive pass rushers, creates numbers advantage in space. RB must sell pass protection initially then slip late to flat, timing is critical

name: RPO Bubble Screen with Y Pop
core_idea: Conflict between run support and pass coverage - forces LBs to choose run or pass. QB must read the conflict defender (usually MLB or OLB) - if he comes down on run, throw the pop route immediately

name: X Dig with Protection Concepts
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, LB depth vs dig route timing. RB must execute proper chip technique - hands up, square shoulders, then release to flat

name: Levelscurl Concept
core_idea: Multiple levels stress zone coverage, curl route finds soft spots between linebackers and safeties. Quarterback must read levels from inside out - slot curl first, then drag, then swing

name: Quick Gamebase Run
core_idea: Numerical advantage in box when defense spreads to cover 4 vertical receivers. Clean mesh point execution between QB and RB - secure handoff

name: QB Power Run
core_idea: QB speed and power in short yardage, numbers advantage with all receivers clearing vertically. QB must follow RB lead blocker through A gap, lower shoulder on contact, fight for every yard

name: Running Back Screen
core_idea: Over-aggressive pass rush that gets upfield too fast. Patience is critical - QB must let rush come before throwing screen

name: Ydraglevels
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 2, underneath zone coverage, TE speed mismatch vs LB. TE must get depth on drag to clear LBs, timing critical at 12-yard depth

name: Saillevels
core_idea: Creates horizontal levels on right side - forces defense to cover 3 different depths simultaneously. Sail concept creates natural picks and levels - QB reads low to high based on coverage

name: Play Action Slot Under
core_idea: Underneath hole in Cover 3, creates pick potential with slot drag vs man coverage. Sell play action fake hard to freeze linebackers, slot receiver must find soft spot in zone coverage

name: Ycross Flood
core_idea: Floods right side with 4 routes at different levels - creates natural picks and overloads zone coverage. Timing on the cross route is critical - TE must get depth before breaking across

name: Trailrub Concept
core_idea: Natural rub/pick action from bunch formation creates separation, trail concept attacks void behind crossing routes. Timing of trail route is critical - TE must delay slightly to follow behind bunch receivers for maximum rub effect

name: TE Out Concept
core_idea: TE mismatch vs LB coverage, middle of field vs Cover 3. Sell play action fake convincingly, TE must create separation at break point of out route

name: RPO Read Flat
core_idea: Conflict between run support and flat coverage responsibilities. QB must read flat defender's hips and first step - down = throw, out = hand off

name: Jet Cross
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates natural rub with crossing routes. Sell play action fake hard to freeze linebackers, timing on deep cross critical

name: Z Underdrag Concept
core_idea: Underneath zone holes, creates natural pick/rub potential with stack formation. Z receiver must find soft spot in zone coverage and settle, timing critical on drag route

name: Smash Dagger
core_idea: High-low concept on right side - forces safety to choose between corner route and TE underneath. QB must read the leverage and depth of safety over the smash concept - throw where the safety isn't

name: Dig Concept with RB Option
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, linebacker depth vs dig route. Timing on dig route - ball thrown as receiver hits break point at 18-yard depth

name: Pivot Returndeep Comeback
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, sits between LB and safety coverage. Slot receiver must find soft spot between zones and sit down in coverage window

name: Corner Strike
core_idea: Deep corner window between CB and safety in Cover 2, back shoulder timing vs man. Corner route timing is critical - QB must lead receiver to back corner with perfect placement

name: Orbit Motion with Spot Routes
core_idea: Orbit motion creates picks vs man coverage, corner route attacks Cover 2 hole, spot route finds Cover 3 zone gaps. Orbit motion timing is critical - Z must get depth and width on corner route after motion

name: Scissorscross
core_idea: Creates crossing action with scissors concept - TE and Z cross paths to create natural rubs vs man, floods underneath vs zone. Timing is critical - Z must sit in hole between LBs on dig, QB must anticipate the break

name: Deep Dig Concept
core_idea: Deep middle hole in Cover 3, creates rub action with crossing routes. QB must identify window timing on dig route - throw before WR breaks to avoid safety

name: Outside Zone Stretch
core_idea: Horizontal stretch of defense, gets RB to edge. RB must be patient and let the play develop horizontally before cutting upfield

name: Traillevels
core_idea: Creates natural rub/pick action with crossing routes, TE trails behind for open window. TE must settle in soft spot behind crossing routes - timing critical with QB

name: TE Option Route
core_idea: TE vs LB mismatch in coverage, option route creates separation vs any coverage. TE must read coverage post-snap - sit in soft spot vs zone, break to open space vs man

name: Diveplunge
core_idea: A-gap with FB lead block creates guaranteed running lane. FB must identify and attack first LB in hole, RB follows FB's path exactly

name: RPO Read Flat Wheel
core_idea: Linebacker in conflict - cannot cover both run fit and flat route responsibility. QB must make quick pre-snap read of key linebacker and decisive post-snap decision

name: Quick Slants
core_idea: Quick timing beats pass rush, slants exploit inside leverage of corners. Get ball out in 2.5 seconds or less - timing based on QB's third step
